{{Quote|There's nothing here but dirt and rocks!|[[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]]|<ref name="trb" />}}
'''Zandor''' was a barren [[Desert/Legends|desert]] land on the [[Endor/Legends|forest moon of Endor]] that was home to [[Ogre]]s as well as the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] rock-like creatures known as [[Zandor Rocker]]s. Zandor was separated from [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] lands by the [[Gorge of Fire]], which could only be traversed via the legendary [[Rainbow Bridge]]. 

==Description==
{{Quote|That's too dangerous to even hang glide across!|Wicket commenting on the Gorge of Fire|<ref name="trb" />}}
Zandor was located on Endor, and could not be accessed unless someone was able to cross the [[Gorge of Fire]]. According to the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]], the only way to cross it was to use the legendary [[Bridge crystal|rainbow crystal]], which formed a [[Rainbow Bridge]]. [[Sunnydew flower]]s were the only known plants in the land. However, the [[Ogre]] [[Gantu]] stole all of the flowers for the [[Glowing nectar|valued nectar the flowers produced]], rendering it a rocky waste.<ref name="trb" />

==History==
{{Quote|When the Ogre destroyed the Sunnydews, our other plants died and our land became a desert!|A Zandor Rocker|<ref name="trb" />}}
[[File:Sunnydew_flower.png|thumb|left|A sunnydew flower from Zandor in an Ewok's hands.]]
Zandor was once a thriving land covered in sunnydew flowers, which produced a healing nectar that kept the rest of the region's flora alive. However, the rampaging Ogre Gantu eventually cut down all of the flowers, turning Zandor into a wasteland. He went on to raid across the Rainbow Bridge into Ewok lands, before [[Chief/Legends|Chief]] [[Chirpa/Legends|Chirpa]] of [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]] followed him back to Zandor and stole the rainbow crystal. Two other Ewoks, [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Wystri Warrick]] and [[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]], also ventured into Zandor [[3 ABY/Legends|some years later]] and chased Gantu off, leading to a regrowth of sunnydews that promised to spread across the region.<ref name="trb" />

==Inhabitants==
{{Quote|The only living thing we've seen is that little half-dead plant!|Teebo|<ref name="trb" />}}
Zandor was home to two known sentient species. Both [[Ogre]]s and [[Zandor Rocker]]s lived in Zandor, but, on two occasions, Ewoks visited there for a short night or two. Ewoks were never native to Zandor, however. Ogres were a species of large, pale, [[near-Human]] creatures that lived in caves in Zandor. The only known member of the species, Gantu, raided [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]], as well as the territory of the Zandor Rockers, with the rainbow crystal.<ref name="trb" />

The Zandor Rockers were a species of sentient rocks capable of movement. They were friendly to visitors and often welcomed them, as they did to Wicket Wystri Warrick and Teebo. They were capable of making underground tunnels quickly only using their bodies, as they did to tunnel underneath the Gorge of Fire.<ref name="trb" />

==Behind the scenes==
Zandor was one of the primary settings of [[Ewoks (1985) 1|''Ewoks'' 1]], written by [[David Manak]], illustrated by [[Warren Kremer]] and released in [[1985]].<ref name="trb" />
